Home / Service Areas / Lee's Summit

Roofer in Lee's Summit, MO

Trusted local professionals serving Lee's Summit and surrounding communities

Serving Lee's Summit, MO

Ramirez Roofing & Repair LLC proudly serves the Lee's Summit, Missouri area, providing top-quality roofing services to homeowners throughout the city. Lee's Summit is characterized by its established neighborhoods, many with homes built during the 1970s through the 1990s. We understand the roofing needs of these homes and offer a wide range of services to keep them protected. Our team is experienced in handling the challenges posed by Lee's Summit's climate, including cold winters with ice storms. We provide thorough inspections, expert repairs, and reliable installations to ensure your home is protected year-round. Whether you're dealing with a leaky roof, damaged gutters, or are looking to upgrade your existing roofing system, Ramirez Roofing & Repair LLC is here to help.

Lee's Summit is a vibrant city known for its excellent schools, family-friendly environment, and diverse housing options, with many homes built in the latter half of the 20th century.

Roofer Services in Lee's Summit

Roof Repair

Fast and reliable roof repair services to protect your home from leaks and damage.

Learn more →

Roof Replacement

Expert roof replacement services to protect your home with a durable, long-lasting roof.

Learn more →

Gutter Services

Protect your home's foundation with our professional gutter installation, repair, and cleaning services.

Learn more →

Storm Damage Repair

Reliable storm damage repair services to restore your roof and protect your home after severe weather.

Learn more →

Skylight Services

Brighten your home with our skylight installation, repair, and replacement services.

Learn more →

Roof Inspections

Comprehensive roof inspections to identify potential problems and protect your investment.

Learn more →
